# Plan: Fixture — 22 AC heavy plan

## Overview

Fixture plan with exactly 22 positive Acceptance Criteria. Used to verify
that heavy plans produce EVALUATOR_MAX_TURNS = max(60, 22 * 4) = max(60, 88) = 88,
which is above the floor. The ac-evaluator is invoked exactly once (no partition,
since AC_COUNT < 30).

## Affected files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `tests/fixtures/ac-count-plans/plan-22ac.md` | fixture — no source changes |
